name: mcp-alchemy
description: MCP Alchemy SQLAlchemy database MCP server — SQL injection via execute_query tool with no parameterization; multi-database credential exposure (arXiv:2509.06572)
notes: DATABASE_URL must be set; defaults to SQLite for testbed. SQL injection via execute_query and read_query tools (no parameterization).
version_note: Version 2.4.0 is the estimated stable PyPI release closest to the paper submission date (September 2025). The SQL injection vulnerability via execute_query applies to this generation of the package.
benchmark_note: Exact version used in arXiv:2509.06572 is not disclosed; 2.4.0 is the best estimate based on PyPI release history around that date.
